steps.title: Follow the however
steps.content: The passage first reports Costa and colleagues' conclusion, then uses however to introduce a limitation: the study relied on a mean sample size of only about 15 fish. Miller and colleagues warn that small samples can produce biased, exaggerated results.

steps.title: Name the purpose
steps.content: Choice A says the passage discusses an overlooked aspect of ocean acidification, but the focus is study methodology. Choice C invents a debate about the cause of ocean acidification. Choice D says the text explains fish behavior changing over time, which it does not. The remaining choice identifies the concern about a study's findings. The answer is B.
